title: elaphoglossum occidentale
intro: Elaphoglossum occidentale, also known as Western Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its small, delicate fronds and terrestrial growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum occidentale include reducing pain and swelling, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Elaphoglossum occidentale can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the roots and rhizomes being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
